name: yulora
description: Local-first Markdown desktop editor MVP shell.

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on dist-electron/main/main.js dist-electron/preload/preload.js dist-electron/shared/open-markdown-file.js dist-electron/shared/save-markdown-file.js dist-cli/cli/bin.js http://localhost:5173 && node ./node_modules/cross-env/dist/bin/cross-env.js VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron .
scripts.dev:electron:test-workbench: wait-on dist-electron/main/main.js dist-electron/preload/preload.js dist-electron/shared/open-markdown-file.js dist-electron/shared/save-markdown-file.js dist-cli/cli/bin.js http://localhost:5174 && node ./node_modules/cross-env/dist/bin/cross-env.js YULORA_START_MODE=test-workbench VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5174 electron .
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron && npm run build:cli
scripts.clean: rimraf dist dist-electron dist-cli tsconfig.electron.tsbuildinfo tsconfig.renderer.tsbuildinfo tsconfig.vitest.tsbuildinfo tsconfig.cli.tsbuildinfo
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.renderer.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.electron.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.vitest.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.cli.json
